---
title: "KDSC R Workshop: Statistical Analysis"
source: "Workshop Material"
author: "Thomas Becker"
institution: "University of Kansas"
competency: [Data Wrangling, Programming Skills, Statistical Foundations]
tech-lang: [R]
main-format: [PDF, Code, Data]
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

This is the third session in the 2025 R workshop series, covering the basics of statistical analysis in R.

## Module Materials

You can access the material [here](https://github.com/KansasData/Module/tree/main/ku_Thomas_R_Statistical_Analysis_April_2025/Statistical%20Analysis%20-%20Thomas%20(April%2022))

This Material is under the [CC BY-ND license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nd/4.0/deed.en)
